careers.title: Software Engineer
careers.description: Design, build, test, and operate production-grade software. Typical work includes implementing microservices and APIs, collaborating on architecture/design reviews, writing unit/integration tests, performance tuning, and incident handling. Common context: distributed systems, cloud-native apps, observability (logs/metrics/traces), and secure coding practices. Tools & frameworks often used: Java/Kotlin/Go/Python/TypeScript, Spring Boot/.NET/Node.js, Git, Docker, Kubernetes, AWS/GCP/Azure, GitHub Actions/Jenkins, Prometheus/Grafana.

careers.title: Backend Engineer
careers.description: Focus on server-side systems: design REST/GraphQL APIs, data models, caching, and messaging pipelines. Responsibilities include database schema design, query optimization, securing endpoints (OAuth/JWT), and reliability (rate limiting, retries, idempotency). Typical stack: PostgreSQL/MySQL/MongoDB, Redis, Kafka/RabbitMQ, gRPC, containerized services, IaC for deployments.

careers.title: Frontend Engineer
careers.description: Build accessible, performant web interfaces. Typical work: component development, state management, SSR/SSG (Next.js/Nuxt), web performance optimization, cross-browser testing, and A11y compliance. Collaborates with designers via design systems and tokens. Tools: React/Vue/Angular, TypeScript, Vite/Webpack, Jest/Playwright/Cypress.

careers.title: Mobile Engineer
careers.description: Develop native or cross-platform mobile apps. Responsibilities: building UI components, offline-first data sync, push notifications, store releases, crash analytics, and performance profiling. Typical stack: Kotlin/Swift, Flutter/React Native, Firebase services, mobile CI/CD, app signing and deployment.

careers.title: Data Scientist
careers.description: Plan and run experiments, perform feature engineering, train/evaluate ML models, and communicate insights to stakeholders. Context includes notebooks, reproducible pipelines, and business KPIs. Tools: Python, Pandas/NumPy, scikit-learn, PyTorch/TensorFlow, SQL, visualization (Matplotlib/Seaborn), experiment tracking (MLflow), and deployment with FastAPI.

careers.title: Machine Learning Engineer
careers.description: Productionize ML: build training/inference pipelines, manage model/versioning, deploy models to scalable serving, and monitor drift/performance. Typical stack: PyTorch/TensorFlow, ONNX/Triton, Airflow, Kafka, Kubernetes, feature stores (Feast), experiment tracking (MLflow), and model monitoring.

careers.title: Data Analyst
careers.description: Transform data into actionable insights: write complex SQL, build dashboards, define metrics, and run A/B tests. Collaborates with product/marketing to drive decisions. Tools: Power BI/Tableau/Looker, Excel, GA4 or product analytics, and lightweight Python/R for data wrangling.

careers.title: DevOps Engineer
careers.description: Own CI/CD, infrastructure automation, and reliability engineering. Responsibilities: container orchestration, IaC, secrets management, observability, and incident response. Tools: Docker, Kubernetes, Terraform, Helm, GitHub Actions/Jenkins, Prometheus/Grafana, ELK/OpenSearch.

careers.title: Cloud Engineer
careers.description: Design and operate cloud infrastructure across AWS/GCP/Azure. Typical work: VPC/networking, IAM security, serverless (Lambda/Cloud Functions), storage (S3/GCS), container platforms, backup/DR, and cost optimization. Uses IaC and cloud-native monitoring tools.

careers.title: QA Engineer
careers.description: Ensure product quality via test strategy, automation, and non-functional testing. Responsibilities: API/UI automation, regression suites, performance tests (k6/JMeter), and defect triage. Tools: Selenium/Cypress/Playwright, Postman, k6/JMeter, TestRail/Jira.

careers.title: Cybersecurity Analyst
careers.description: Monitor and respond to security events: SOC operations, SIEM alerting, endpoint detection/response, vulnerability management, and incident handling. Tools: Splunk/ELK, EDR platforms, Nessus/OpenVAS, firewalls/WAF, and threat intelligence feeds.

careers.title: Network Engineer
careers.description: Design, configure, and maintain enterprise networks. Responsibilities: routing/switching, VPNs, firewalls, QoS, and network monitoring. Tools/vendors: Cisco/Juniper/MikroTik, Fortinet/Palo Alto, SNMP/NMS, and automation via scripts.

careers.title: Product Manager
careers.description: Drive product outcomes: discovery, requirements, prioritization, roadmap, and stakeholder alignment. Defines success metrics and coordinates delivery with engineering/design. Tools: Jira/Confluence, product analytics, and experimentation frameworks.

careers.title: UI/UX Designer
careers.description: Plan and execute user-centered design: research, personas, user flows, wireframes, prototypes, and usability testing. Develop and maintain design systems and ensure accessibility. Tools: Figma, collaborative handoff to engineering, and analytics-informed iteration.

careers.title: Digital Marketer
careers.description: Plan and optimize omnichannel campaigns: SEO/SEM, paid ads, social/content, email/CRM, and conversion rate optimization. Responsibilities include analytics (GA4), audience segmentation, creatives testing, and automation workflows.
